intro.title: Create an API Key
intro.description: Follow this quick 5-step guide to generate your first API key for the Asset Picker.

outro.title: You're all set!
outro.description: Your API key is ready. Want to see the steps again?

scenes.title: Spotlight Dashboard
scenes.description: Start from the Experiences home page. Navigate to API Keys in the sidebar to create credentials for the Asset Picker.

scenes.title: API Keys Page
scenes.description: The API Keys page shows all your programmatic access tokens. Click "Create key" to generate a new one.
